---
title: "Edith Margaret Argles"
---

## Edith Margaret Argles

**Dates:** (1853-9 April 1935)

### Description

social worker

### Biography

Daughter of the Very Rev. Marsham Argles (1814-1892) and Margaret Julia Davys (1816/7-1898), she was one of the first students at Lady Margaret Hall and later worked for it both as an administrator and in its settlement work.  [LG 1952 Argles of Sibson]

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 22 1899
- Letter from 25th August [1882]
- Letter from July 17th 1879
- Letter from June 5th [1872] [[footnote:1]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
